name: PT Cipta Selera Murni Tbk
summary: PT Cipta Selera Murni Tbk, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the fast food restaurant business in Indonesia. It offers french fries, honey butter biscuits, mashed potatoes, coleslaw, mixed salad, chicken soup, liver, and gizzard; spicy, white, and fried rice; and potato cutlets, chicken chunks, sphaghetti, spicy and original chicken tender, burger, and wraps. The company also offers mineral water; soft, bottled, and hot drinks; and ice creams. In addition, it trades in household appliances and equipment, consumer electronics, stereo equipment, video game consoles, lighting equipment, porcelain and glass drinking utensils, and other appliances, as well as spoons, knives, forks, tools made of wood, articles of plaiting and articles of cork, wallpaper, carpets etc. As of April 2, 2020, the company operated 37 outlets under the Texas chicken brand name. PT Cipta Selera Murni Tbk was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.
